Name: Vethi (Vethibel)
Race: Being of Ib (-4 Str/-2 Con/+4 Wis)
Feat3: LVL 3) Combat Casting - +4 concentration to cast defensively / when grappled
Feat4: Flaw) Spell Focus (Conjuration) - prereq for Augment; +1 DC conjuration
Feat5: Flaw) Augment Summoning - Summon Nature's Ally get +4 Str & +4 Con
Feat7: BG) Scribe Scroll - the archivist who writes her own scrolls
Feat8: Oath 2) Extra Hex - Fortune (give an ally/self a reroll, 1/round)
Feat18: Mysterious Stranger (archetype, replaces Woodland Stride): +1/2 druid lvl to others' DC to learn about you
Feat17: Spirit (Lore) -> Monstrous Insight (Su): ID a creature (insight bonus = shaman lvl), +2 insight atk & AC vs it 1 min; 1/day (Cha 7)
Featxtra1: [Later: Resist Death's Touch @4, MANY LIVES self-reincarnate @5, Wild Shape @6]
Featxtra2: Spirit Animal: Toad (familiar) -> grants you +3 HP; toad has +2 Init/+4 Stealth; can Deliver Touch Spells/Hexes (lvl 3)
__txt_char_personality: Patient, observant, gently stubborn; the calm of someone for whom most emergencies are slower than dying was. Kind by default (a healer) but with an archivist's coldness about getting the record right. She communicates by signing (Ib), writing, and expression; allies learn to read her frills and hands. The irony she carries: she can understand every language ever spoken and holds a dead world's history, yet cannot say one word aloud, everything she knows she must write down or lose.
__txt_char_flaws:
##### DRAWBACKS & FLAWS #####
PF DRAWBACKS (required + optional):
• Sentimental (REQUIRED, meaningful): thoughts stray to the past at bad moments
• Umbral Unmasking - she casts a monstrous/absent shadow

FLAWS / MAJOR DRAWBACKS
• Noncombatant (flaw): -2 melee attack rolls
• Feeble (flaw): -2 on Str/Dex/Con CHECKS & physical skills
• Nonathletic (major drawback): -2 on Str CHECKS and skills, cannot take 10, -1 CMD.

CHARACTER FLAW (roleplay hook): she will risk herself and the party for a fragment of lost knowledge she cannot let go unrecorded.
__txt_text2:
################# OATH BOONS #################
1. Bonus Feats (4 Oath Points)
2. Immortality (Ex) (2 Oath Points)
3. Accelerated Recovery (3 Oath points)
__txt_text1:
################# OATHS #################
Forbidden Knowledge [Death Wish {Greater}] (4 Oath Points)   - bound to seek & preserve lost/forbidden lore at any cost (mirrors her flaw)
Oath against Artifice (2 Oath Points)                        - a druid of the natural world; refuses technology, firearms, constructs
Oath of Candor (1 Oath Point)                                - records & communicates only truth (trivially kept by a mute archivist)
Oath of Abstinence (1 Oath Point)                            - ascetic; forgoes luxury, intoxicants, indulgence
Oath of Loyalty [The Drowned Memory] (1 Oath Point)          - loyal to her faith: preserving the memory of the world-before
Total Points: 9
__txt_char_traits:
##### TRAITS (4 + 5th via 2nd drawback) #####
• Gesture Expertise (Social): sign complex messages in combat; DC15 Linguistics to convey basics to anyone - how a mute communicates
• Scholar of the Great Beyond (Faith): +1 Kn(History) & Kn(Planes); Kn(History) becomes a class skill
• Reactionary (Combat): +2 initiative
• Focused Mind (Magic): +2 concentration
• [Formerly Mind-Swapped (Campaign) - 1/day, reroll one Knowledge check you've just failed; and you may attempt untrained Knowledge checks with DCs up to 20 (instead of 10).
Lang6: Understands all; CANNOT SPEAK (Voiceless). Communicates by sign (Ib) & writing.
Spell02: Voiceless: every spell's verbal component is replaced by a THOUGHT component
Spell05: 0: Create Water, Detect Magic, Guidance, Stabilize
Spell06: 1st: Cure Light Wounds, Produce Flame, Entangle
Spell11: 1st: Cure Light Wounds, Bless, Comprehend Languages
__txt_char_description:
Small, slight, almost fragile, with the soft neotenic roundness of a face that never aged past girlhood, until you reach her large, dark, depthless eyes, which rest on things a half-second too long, as if reading their history. Faint gold freckles cross her cheeks.

Born the slate grey-green of her drowned kind, she was stained ABYSSAL BLUE-BLACK (faint violet sheen, gold flecks like phosphorescent silt) by the lightless water she died and was resurrected in. The original grey-green still shows through where the stain wore thin, palms, soles, throat, inner wrists, lower legs, and the membranes of her frills.

Where a girl's ears would be she has only her FRILL-EARS: the three feathery external gills of an axolotl, grown into soft iridescent lavender-blue fronds that glow with a cold inner light and lift/fan when she is alert or casting. A long finned salamander tail, dark at the base and fading to translucent lavender shot with gold, trails behind her. Hands and bare feet are webbed and lightly clawed.

She dresses for water: frayed oilcloth wraps in muted river colors, nothing metal. A bandolier of cork-stoppered glass bottles (each hand-labelled with a glyph and ribbon), a foraging satchel, a chalk slate and an ink-and-vellum journal, because she has NO VOICE, and these are how she speaks. At her collar a small pale toad (her spirit animal) rests in a glass bead of water.

When her power moves: no fire, her frills rise, her eyes darken, and for a heartbeat the color seems to drain from the air, as if she is pulling the meaning out of a thing rather than light.
Feat24: Nature Bond -> HERBALISM: brew herbal concoctions (druid-spell potions); free/day = Wis mod = 6
Feat25: Nature Sense (+2 Kn Nature & Survival); Wild Empathy (1d20+1); Druidic; spontaneous Summon Nature's Ally
ArmorSpecial: Non-metal (druid-legal). +2 natural AC when Barkskin is active.
Weapon2Special: Rolls 30 ft/round; no attack roll; her DC 18
Gear03: Muleback Cords (1,000) — eff. Str 11 for carry
Gear04: Wand of Cure Light Wounds, 50 chg (750)
Gear07: Slate + chalk, ink, vellum journal, ribbon label-tags (her 'voice')
Gear09: Spell component pouch; belt pouch; waterskin; bedroll; sundries
Featxtrax21: Darkvision 60 ft; Low-Light Vision; Speed 20 ft / Swim 30 ft
Featxtra4: Hex -> Benefit of Wisdom: use WIS in place of INT on all Int-based skill checks  <<< keystone
Featxtra18: Aquatic: breathe water; no Swim checks; Swim always class skill
Featxtra20: Amorphous: IMMUNE to precision damage (sneak attack) & critical hits
Featxtra21: Voiceless: cannot speak/take verbal actions; ALL verbal spell components -> thought components
